description_long: This is a modern, geometric pendant chandelier featuring a matte black metal frame with intersecting horizontal and vertical rods. The fixture is suspended from a ceiling mount by a single cord, with six exposed spherical glass bulbs arranged symmetrically at the ends of the rods. The bulbs are evenly spaced, creating a balanced and visually striking appearance. The design is minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on the contrast between the black metal and the clear glass bulbs. The fixture's structure is open, allowing light to disperse freely in all directions. This lamp would suit contemporary urban interiors, such as lofts, cafes, or upscale public spaces.
description: A modern black metal pendant chandelier with six exposed spherical glass bulbs arranged on intersecting rods. Its geometric, minimalist design is visually striking and ideal for contemporary urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six glass bulbs and the symmetrical arrangement of the intersecting rods.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the fixture and the alignment of bulbs along the rods.
description_view_2: Rear view, similar to the front, displaying the full set of bulbs and the geometric rod structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the depth and the spatial arrangement of the bulbs.
